problem_text_cn:
4-2 质量$m_0$的质点固定不动，在它的万有引力作用下，质量$m$的质点作半径为$R$的圆轨道运动。取圆周上$P$点为参考点，如图4-2所示，试求：
(1) 质点$m$在图中点1处所受引力的力矩$M_1$和质点$m$的角动量$L_1$；
(2) 质点$m$在图中点2处所受引力的力矩$M_2$和质点$m$的角动量$L_2$。
problem_solution_cn:
解 (1) 在点1处，$m$所受引力指向$P$点，故
$$
M_1=0.
$$
速度切向，大小为$v_1=\sqrt{Gm_0/R}$，故角动量为
$$
L_1:\begin{cases}方向:垂直图平面朝外,\\大小:L_1=2m\sqrt{Gm_0R}.\end{cases}
$$
(2) 在点2处，可相应求得
$$
M_2:\begin{cases}方向:垂直图平面朝里,\\大小:M_2=Gm_0m/R.\end{cases}
$$
速度切向，大小同$v_1$，角动量为
$$
L_2:\begin{cases}方向:垂直图平面朝外,\\大小:L_2=m\sqrt{Gm_0R}.\end{cases}
$$
problem_solution_en:
Solution (1) At point 1, the gravitational force on $m$ points toward $P$, hence
$$
M_1=0.
$$
The velocity is tangential, with magnitude $v_1=\sqrt{Gm_0/R}$. Therefore, the angular momentum is
$$
L_1:\begin{cases}direction: out of the plane of the figure,\\magnitude:L_1=2m\sqrt{Gm_0R}.\end{cases}
$$
(2) At point 2, we obtain
$$
M_2:\begin{cases}direction: into the plane of the figure,\\magnitude:M_2=Gm_0m/R.\end{cases}
$$
The velocity is tangential, with the same magnitude as $v_1$, and the angular momentum is
$$
L_2:\begin{cases}direction: out of the plane of the figure,\\magnitude:L_2=m\sqrt{Gm_0R}.\end{cases}
$$
img_cn: 该图片展示了一道物理习题。题目描述为“质量$m_0$的质点固定不动，在它的万有引力作用下，质量$m$的质点作半径为$R$的圆轨道运动。取圆周上$P$点为参考点，如图4-2所示，试求：(1)质点$m$在图中点1处所受引力的力矩$M_1$和质点$m$的角动量$L_1$；(2)质点$m$在图中点2处所受引力的力矩$M_2$和质点$m$的角动量$L_2$。”图片下方是解答过程，分为(1)和(2)两部分。解答中使用了公式，如$v_1=\sqrt{Gm_0/R}$，$L_1=2m\sqrt{Gm_0R}$，$M_2=Gm_0m/R$，$L_2=m\sqrt{Gm_0R}$等。图片右上方有页码“108”，下方有“力学习题与解答”字样。整体布局清晰，文字和公式易于识别。
img_en: The image presents a physics exercise. The problem statement is: "A particle of mass $m_0$ is fixed. Under its gravitational attraction, a particle of mass $m$ moves in a circular orbit of radius $R$. Taking a point $P$ on the circle as the reference point, as shown in Figure 4-2, find: (1) the torque $M_1$ on particle $m$ due to the gravitational force and the angular momentum $L_1$ of particle $m$ at point 1 in the figure; (2) the torque $M_2$ on particle $m$ due to the gravitational force and the angular momentum $L_2$ of particle $m$ at point 2 in the figure." Below the problem statement is the solution, divided into parts (1) and (2). The solution includes formulas such as $v_1=\sqrt{Gm_0/R}$, $L_1=2m\sqrt{Gm_0R}$, $M_2=Gm_0m/R$, $L_2=m\sqrt{Gm_0R}$, etc. The top right shows the page number "108", and the bottom has the text "力学习题与解答". The overall layout is clear, and the text and formulas are easy to read.
problem_answer:
(1) $M_1=0$，$L_1$方向垂直图平面朝外，大小为$L_1=2m\sqrt{Gm_0R}$。
(2) $M_2$方向垂直图平面朝里，大小为$M_2=Gm_0m/R$；$L_2$方向垂直图平面朝外，大小为$L_2=m\sqrt{Gm_0R}$。
